testsuite.name: com.example.myAirline.services.AppUserServiceTest

testcase.name: testAddNew()

failure.message: java.lang.IllegalStateException: Could not find html file at path ./mail/templates/accountConfirmation.html.

testcase.name: testGetByEmail()

failure.message: java.lang.IllegalStateException: Could not find user: florin.schikarski@gmail.com
